productTitle: Ubiquiti airFiber X 5 GHz, 30 dBi, Slant 45
name: Ubiquiti airFiber X 5 GHz, 30 dBi, Slant 45
title: Ubiquiti airFiber X 5 GHz, 30 dBi, Slant 45
title_extended: Ubiquiti airFiber X 5 GHz, 30 dBi, Slant 45 - Parabolic Dish Antenna 5GHz 30dBi, Dual Linear Polarization, 2 x RP-SMA Female Connectors
short_description: Parabolic Dish Antenna 5GHz 30dBi, Dual Linear Polarization, 2 x RP-SMA Female Connectors
description: Parabolic Dish Antenna 5GHz 30dBi, Dual Linear Polarization, 2 x RP-SMA Female Connectors

detailed_description.heading: Compatible with airFiber X radios
detailed_description.text: The AirFiber 5G30-S45 is a high-caliber sector antenna developed by Ubiquiti Networks, a company renowned for its innovative networking solutions that deliver exceptional performance. This model is part of the AirFiber series, specifically designed to meet the demands of modern high-capacity, long-distance wireless networking applications. The AF-5G30-S45 stands out as a testament to Ubiquiti's commitment to providing advanced, reliable, and efficient wireless communication solutions.

detailed_description.heading: Integration and Design
detailed_description.text: The AirFiber 5G30-S45 antenna from Ubiquiti is designed to be used in conjunction with an AirFiber X radio from the same brand. It cannot operate on its own as it is a directional antenna that requires a radio unit to transmit and receive signals. Engineered for use in the 5 GHz frequency band, the AirFiber 5G30-S45 boasts a 30dBi gain, making it one of the most powerful antennas in its class. This high gain is instrumental in achieving long-distance, point-to-point (PtP) connectivity, enabling the deployment of wireless backhaul networks that require minimal interference and maximum performance. The antenna is optimized for use with Ubiquiti's AirFiber X radios, forming a synergistic system capable of delivering gigabit-plus throughput levels essential for backhaul, broadband access, and private network applications.

detailed_description.heading: Durability and Ease of Installation
detailed_description.text: The AirFiber 5G30-S45 is designed with durability and resilience in mind. Constructed from robust materials, the antenna is built to withstand the rigors of outdoor deployment. It features weather-resistant properties that protect it against harsh environmental elements such as rain, wind, and UV exposure. Ease of installation is another hallmark of the AF-5G30-S45. The antenna comes with a versatile mounting kit, allowing for straightforward and secure attachment to various structures. This flexibility in mounting options, combined with the antenna's precision alignment capabilities, facilitates optimal positioning and orientation for maximum signal strength and coverage.

detailed_description.heading: Advanced RF Isolation and Slant 45 Technology
detailed_description.text: The AirFiber 5G30-S45 also features advanced RF isolation and noise filtration technologies. These innovations are critical for operating in crowded RF environments, where minimizing interference is paramount for maintaining high-quality connections. The antenna's superior isolation characteristics prevent cross-talk and signal leakage, further enhancing the network's performance and reliability. A distinctive feature of the AF-5G30-S45 is its incorporation of Slant 45 technology. This dual-polarity design, employing both vertical and horizontal polarization angles, significantly enhances signal penetration and network reliability. By mitigating interference and improving multipath resistance, Slant 45 technology ensures stable and high-quality wireless connections, even in densely populated or challenging RF environments.
